summary: First-iteration full-stack test of Rocha & Barbosa site. Backend 12/12 endpoints pass (health, auth/register+login+me, leads, contact, blog list/filter/slug, resources open+gated, admin stats/leads/contacts with auth, chat via Claude Sonnet 4.5 Emergent key). Frontend main flows work: home hero, diagnostico lead submission (toast 'Recebemos sua solicitação'), contato submission (toast 'Mensagem enviada.'), blog listing (1 featured + 5 cards), SPED category filter reduces to 1 post, blog post detail navigation, resources page shows 6 items, gated modal opens and unlocks ('Acesso liberado. Obrigado!'), admin login redirects to /admin and shows 4 stat cards. One UI issue: floating chat widget toggle button at bottom-right is NOT clickable in the preview environment because the 'Made with Emergent' badge overlays it (chat-panel never becomes visible after click). Backend /api/chat itself works fine, so this is purely a z-index/positioning problem. Also observed a minor header spacing bug when logged in as admin: links render as 'CONTATOADMINSAIR' with no separator (visible in first screenshot).

ui_bugs.issue: chat-toggle button at bottom-right is covered by the 'Made with Emergent' badge; click does not open chat-panel (is_visible=False). Need to raise z-index above Emergent badge (e.g., z-[70]) or reposition toggle (bottom-24 right-6) so badge does not cover it.
When admin is logged in, header renders 'CONTATO ADMIN SAIR' with no spacing -> visually 'CONTATOADMINSAIR'. Add gap/space-x between Contato link, Admin link and Sair button.

issues: Hero looks premium and on-brand (navy + gold), no issues

action_items: Fix ChatWidget floating button z-index/position so it is not covered by Emergent badge (e.g., change `fixed bottom-6 right-6` to `fixed bottom-24 right-6 z-[70]` on chat-toggle and panel).
Add spacing between Contato / Admin / Sair in Header when user is authenticated (use gap-6 or space-x-6 like the public links).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/chat replays history by iterating over past user messages and calling send_message for each — this triggers N extra LLM calls per turn and will blow latency/cost quickly. Prefer passing history to LlmChat once or persisting internal chat state; alternatively skip replay and rely on session_id continuity.
server.py variable shadowing: `return await db.resources.find({}, {'_id': 0, 'file_url': 0}).sort(...).to_list(200)` uses variable `r` as loop target elsewhere — cosmetic, OK.
server.py `access_resource` returns `file_url` even for gated resources without validating that the posted lead has valid name/email beyond Pydantic (OK, EmailStr handles it).
server.py @app.on_event is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handlers.
Frontend ChatWidget should also show a loading indicator while awaiting /api/chat (18s wait observed in test).
test_credentials: admin@rochabarbosa.com.br / Admin@2026 (seeded). Registration API works for new users.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seed confirmed: 1 admin user, 6 blog posts (3 categories incl. SPED x2, Reforma Tributária, Protheus x2, Créditos Tributários), 6 resources (3 open + 3 gated).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green via pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py. Frontend correct data-testids: ct-name/ct-email/ct-message/ct-submit for Contato; blog-featured + blog-post-{slug} + blog-cat-{category}; res-btn-{id} triggers resource-gate modal with gate-name/gate-email/gate-company/gate-submit; chat-toggle/chat-panel/chat-input/chat-send/chat-tab-ia/chat-tab-wa/chat-wa-link. Only remaining blocker is chat-toggle overlay.
rca_of_the_issue: Chat button not openable in preview: both the Emergent 'Made with Emergent' badge and the chat-toggle use fixed bottom-right positioning with similar z-index; the badge is injected by the preview platform on top, intercepting pointer events. Fix by raising toggle above badge (z-[70]) and/or shifting it upward (bottom-24).
